Violation: html-has-lang: Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
Remediation: <html> element must have a lang attribute

Violation: landmark-one-main: Ensure the document has a main landmark
Remediation: Document should have one main landmark

Violation: page-has-heading-one: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
Remediation: Page should contain a level-one heading

Violation: color-contrast: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
Remediation: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

Violation: html-has-lang: Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
Remediation: <html> element must have a lang attribute

Violation: landmark-one-main: Ensure the document has a main landmark
Remediation: Document should have one main landmark

Violation: region: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
Remediation: All page content should be contained by landmarks
